MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Urbanski for (Petitioner) Patricia Bovan-Campbell.

Mr. Urbanski reported that he was unable to file the petition and requested a 3 week continuance. The status on closing the estate was continued to May 11, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
